name: melano-inc-features-cloud-env
install: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; APP_DIR="v0-melano-inc-features"; CACHE_DIR=".cursor/.cache"; HASH_FILE="$CACHE_DIR/v0-deps.sha256"; mkdir -p "$CACHE_DIR"; HASH_INPUTS=("$APP_DIR/package.json"); if [ -f "$APP_DIR/package-lock.json" ]; then HASH_INPUTS+=("$APP_DIR/package-lock.json"); fi; NEW_HASH=$(sha256sum "${HASH_INPUTS[@]}" | sha256sum | cut -d" " -f1); OLD_HASH=""; if [ -f "$HASH_FILE" ]; then OLD_HASH=$(<"$HASH_FILE"); fi; if [ ! -d "$APP_DIR/node_modules" ] || [ "$NEW_HASH" != "$OLD_HASH" ]; then npm --prefix "$APP_DIR" install --no-audit --prefer-offline; echo "$NEW_HASH" > "$HASH_FILE"; else echo "Dependencies already prepared for $APP_DIR"; fi'
